It’s World Quantum Day. ⚛️🥳 Time to learn about quantum interference, aka, the extraordinary way that quantum computers solve complex problems at unprecedented speeds. 🏎️💨
Happy World Quantum Day! ⚛️🥳⚛️ To celebrate, Jenna and Andrew from the Google Quantum AI Lab answer some of your top-searched quantum questions.

Happy World Quantum Day ⚛️ Today’s #GoogleDoodle features the Bloch sphere, a visualization of how a quantum bit, or qubit, works. While a classical computing bit is either 1 or 0, a qubit can be a blend of both called superposition. By harnessing superposition, along with other quantum properties, quantum computers can solve specific, complex problems that are out of reach for today’s supercomputers to solve. 🤯 Want to learn more about the Bloch sphere and quantum computing? It's just a search away.
